title: All In: St. Bernard's
original_title: All In: Miracle at St. Bernard's
overview: A tiny, 100-year-old Catholic school in Fitchburg, Massachusetts is struggling with insolvency. We follow the dramatic campaigns to raise money and enrollment as well as a magical football season that together saved a beloved institution.
